title: Nutella and Candy
description: Why does Nutella not exist in Minecraft? Why is such a delight not in the game? This mod will add the best food into the game!
body:
**Ferrero nor Nutella do not endorse this project! This is NOT in any way official!**

**This mod is only in it's earlier release. It is 1.0 but doesn't have a whole ton of content. Stay tuned for updates!**
## Context
About a year ago (as of writing this), the Nutella mod was created. However, it was buggy, the textures were funky, and in general not the best. This is a recreation of that mod with a more ambitious (and less buggy) vision.

## Overview

Why does Nutella not exist in Minecraft? Why is such a delight not in the game? This mod will add the best food into the game!

This mod also adds a new dimension, Dreamscape. Find how to get there below.

Go exploring! Find nutella! Eat nutella! Make nutella! Find a chocolate cow! Make choclite armor! Have fun!

## Getting Started
First and foremost, I highly suggest for you to get JEI (Just Enough Items). Most people already have it, or at least know what it is, but I'd like to remind you that you'll likely struggle and be confused without it!

Start by crafting Nutella. You can upgrade it to gold, diamond, and netherite, but don't do that if you're specifically trying to go to Dreamscape. Instead, use four to make a Nutella block. Then use four of those to make four Nutella bricks. Then make a portal with the bricks in the same shape of the nether portal. To light it, you'll need Transdimensional Nutella, obtained by combining Nutella and an eye of ender. Light the portal and bam! You have access to Dreamscape.
